file_comments.title: SQL injection via string interpolation
file_comments.comment: The query is built with an f-string from user input, allowing injection. Use a parameterized query instead.

file_comments.title: Missing null check on email
file_comments.comment: user.email is dereferenced without a guard; will raise AttributeError when a user has no email.

review_summary.summary: Blocks on a SQL-injection bug. Two smaller items to address before merge.
